title: koeleria nevadensis
intro: Koeleria nevadensis, also known as Nevada blue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria nevadensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Koeleria nevadensis include infusions, decoctions, and salves that are used to treat various health conditions.
